_comment: Greenlit series slate (from jesus-shorts-series-greenlit.md). Each series carries its hook pattern, CTA pattern, and binding theological guardrails. Episodes list the title, key KJV scripture reference(s), and theme. The primary_ref is fetched as exact KJV and handed to the engine.

series.name: The 7 "I AM" Statements
series.concept: Each "I AM" claim of Jesus in John, the Jewish backdrop (Exodus 3:14), and what it means now.
series.hook_pattern: OT picture -> Jesus' claim -> deity implication
series.cta_pattern: Which I AM do you need to know Him by today?
series.guardrails: Keep the deity claim front and centre. Don't soften 'I AM' into a metaphor. Don't reduce these sayings to generic self-help.

episodes.title: I AM the Bread of Life
I AM the Light of the World
episodes.theme: Jesus reveals and leads (Feast of Tabernacles, pillar of fire)

episodes.title: I AM the Good Shepherd
episodes.theme: Jesus protects and lays down His life

episodes.title: I AM the Resurrection and the Life
I AM the Way, the Truth, and the Life
episodes.theme: Jesus is the only way to the Father

episodes.title: I AM the True Vine
episodes.theme: Life comes from abiding in Christ

series.name: The 7 Words from the Cross
series.concept: Each saying of Jesus from the cross - what it reveals about Him and the gospel.
series.cta_pattern: Devotional reflection that points to the cross
series.guardrails: The traditional order is church tradition, not Scripture. Don't claim the order is biblical.

episodes.title: Today you will be with me in paradise
My God, my God, why hast thou forsaken me
It is finished
episodes.theme: Tetelestai - the debt paid in full

episodes.title: Father, into thy hands I commend my spirit

series.name: Types & Shadows
series.concept: OT figures, objects, and events that foreshadow Christ - restricted to those the NT explicitly confirms or strongly implies.
series.hook_pattern: OT image first -> NT fulfilment -> 'pattern, not coincidence'
series.cta_pattern: Research the rest of these in your own Bible (and meet the Christ they point to)
series.guardrails: No inventing types the Bible never names. Skip Rahab's scarlet cord, Eve from Adam's side, etc. unless you can show NT warrant.

series.name: Encounters
series.concept: One-on-one conversations between Jesus and a single person. Character-driven, emotional.
series.hook_pattern: The person's situation in 3 seconds -> Jesus enters -> the turn
series.cta_pattern: Land at grace, then invite the viewer to the same Jesus
series.guardrails: Don't psychologise characters beyond the text. Don't turn Jesus into a life coach. Every episode lands at the gospel - grace alone, not 'your idols' moralism.

episodes.title: Zacchaeus in the tree
episodes.theme: The Son of man came to seek and save the lost

series.name: Names and Titles of Jesus
series.concept: Each title Scripture gives Jesus - what it meant, what it reveals.
series.hook_pattern: The title -> its OT roots -> its meaning for today
series.cta_pattern: Which name do you need to know Him by today?
series.guardrails: Titles only - not descriptions stretched into titles. Stay disciplined; don't pad with non-titles.

episodes.title: Lamb of God
episodes.theme: Takes away the sin of the world

episodes.title: Wonderful, Counsellor, The Prince of Peace
episodes.theme: The child born, the Son given

episodes.title: King of Kings and Lord of Lords
The Lion of the tribe of Judah
episodes.theme: Root of David, the conqueror who is the Lamb

series.name: Resurrection on Trial
series.concept: Each episode tackles one skeptical objection to the resurrection, then lands at the risen Christ.
series.hook_pattern: State the objection in its strongest form -> answer -> invitation
series.cta_pattern: Risen Christ, not debate scoreboard - invite a response to Him
series.guardrails: Always engage the STRONGEST version of the objection, not a strawman. Tone: invitation, not victory. Arguments clear the ground; the Holy Spirit convicts.

episodes.title: Paul's early creed
episodes.theme: Dated within years of the event

episodes.title: Would they die for a lie?

series.name: The Last Week, Hour by Hour
series.concept: Passion Week chronologically, from Palm Sunday to Resurrection.
series.hook_pattern: Day + hour anchor -> what happened -> why it matters
series.cta_pattern: Build cumulatively toward Easter and the risen Christ
series.guardrails: The four Gospels differ in detail and timing. Don't smooth contradictions out. Where accounts diverge, name it.

series.name: Miracles as Signs
series.concept: Each miracle as a deliberate revelation of Jesus' identity. John calls them signs (semeia).
series.hook_pattern: The miracle -> what it signed about Him
series.cta_pattern: He showed who He was - what will you do with it?
series.guardrails: Let the text drive the meaning. Don't allegorise beyond what the Gospel writer signals.

episodes.title: Water to wine at Cana
episodes.theme: New covenant joy; manifested His glory

episodes.title: Feeding the 5000
episodes.theme: The new Moses, Bread of Life

episodes.title: Walking on water
episodes.theme: Lord over chaos - Be not afraid

episodes.title: Healing the paralytic with forgiveness
episodes.theme: Authority on earth to forgive sins

series.name: Questions Jesus Asked
series.concept: Jesus' questions reveal the heart and call people to respond to Him. Each episode is a short ENCOUNTER, not a mini-lecture — His question lands and exposes the heart.
series.hook_pattern: The scene/person in 3 seconds -> Jesus asks the question -> it turns from the crowd to YOU
series.cta_pattern: Let Jesus' question land personally; invite an honest response to Him (grace, never moralism)
series.guardrails: NOT moralistic — never 'try harder / be braver / do better / prove yourself'. Better: faith grows when we see who Jesus is; grace restores failed disciples; His questions expose the heart so that we respond to Him. SERIES SIGNATURE (every episode must carry it): the question begins in the scene, then TURNS onto the viewer — the same question Jesus put to the person, He now puts to YOU — and the short lands on a response TO JESUS, never on self-improvement. THREE VOICES where the scene has them: narrator (sets the scene) / the person in the passage AND the VIEWER'S OWN INNER RESPONSE (voice the silent answer the question pulls out of the viewer, in the second person) / Jesus (His words from Scripture, KJV, simple and reverent). ENACT a repeated pattern where the text has one — e.g. John 21's three denials -> three questions -> three 'Feed my sheep' — do NOT compress it; the repetition IS the restoration. Where the text RE-COMMISSIONS (Feed my sheep / Follow me / Go and tell), the landing must carry the renewed CALLING, not only the feeling. Let the question LAND — don't be dramatic for its own sake.

episodes.title: Who Do You Say I Am
episodes.theme: The identity of Christ — seeing Jesus rightly is grace (the Father reveals the Son)

episodes.title: Why Are You Afraid
episodes.theme: Faith in the storm — fear forgot who is in the boat; Jesus is Lord over creation

episodes.title: Do You Want to Be Made Well
episodes.theme: Grace enters human helplessness — Jesus initiates, not bound by the pool

episodes.title: Do You Love Me
episodes.theme: The risen Jesus restores failed disciples — three denials, three calls

episodes.title: What Do You Want Me to Do for You
episodes.theme: Honest need before a merciful King; mercy leads to following

episodes.title: Why Do You Call Me Lord
episodes.theme: If Jesus is Lord, His words are the foundation — obedience as fruit of grace, not its price

episodes.title: Where Is Your Faith
episodes.theme: The object of trust when control disappears — faith grows as Jesus' identity becomes clear

episodes.title: Why Are You Troubled
episodes.theme: Resurrection hope — He answers doubt with Himself (wounds shown, body raised)

episodes.title: Have You Not Read
episodes.theme: Jesus the faithful interpreter — God's Word governs our hardest questions (creation design)

episodes.title: Could You Not Watch With Me One Hour
episodes.theme: Disciples' weakness vs Christ's faithfulness — watch and pray because you need Him

series.name: Jesus in the Old Testament
series.concept: Christ foreshadowed and foretold in the Hebrew Scriptures — the OT prophecy or type, the NT fulfilment that confirms it, and why it proves the gospel was God's plan from the beginning. Apologetic in tone, worshipful in landing.
series.hook_pattern: Name the ache or the doubt, OR drop into the ancient scene -> the OT clue written centuries early -> the NT moment it lands on -> it turns to YOU
series.cta_pattern: Let the precision of fulfilled prophecy land as evidence that becomes worship; invite trust in the Christ the whole Bible was pointing to (grace, never a debate scoreboard)
series.guardrails: ENGAGE the strongest honest version — no proof-texting, no stretched types the NT never names. Every claim must cite a REAL NT fulfilment (the NT writer or Jesus Himself makes the link). Tone: invitation, not victory; the Spirit convicts, evidence clears the ground. Land on the risen Christ and a response to Him, never on 'see, Christianity wins'. KJV verbatim. Smart-default opening applies; for a confrontational or claim-of-deity text, open in the scene rather than forcing a felt problem.

episodes.title: The Suffering Servant
episodes.theme: The gospel in the OT — penal substitution foretold 700 years early; the Servant wounded for our transgressions

episodes.title: The Sign of Jonah
episodes.theme: Three days and nights — the one sign Jesus gave, His death and resurrection prefigured

episodes.title: Pierced for Our Transgressions
episodes.theme: They shall look on me whom they have pierced — Yahweh Himself pierced; John cites it at the cross

episodes.title: Born in Bethlehem
episodes.theme: The town named centuries early; 'from of old, from everlasting' hints His pre-existence

episodes.title: The Crucifixion Foretold
episodes.theme: Pierced hands and feet, lots cast for garments — written before crucifixion existed

episodes.title: The Seed of the Woman
episodes.theme: The first gospel — the seed who crushes the serpent though His heel is struck

episodes.title: Born of a Virgin — Immanuel
episodes.theme: A virgin shall conceive — God with us; incarnation and deity foretold

episodes.title: Thirty Pieces of Silver
episodes.theme: The exact betrayal price and the potter's field, foretold and fulfilled to the detail

episodes.title: The Lamb of God
episodes.theme: The Passover lamb whose blood turns away death — Christ our Passover, no bone broken

episodes.title: The Great I AM
episodes.theme: I AM at the burning bush — the name Jesus claims for Himself, and they took up stones
